title: WF-005 download window END + postpone/cancel exceptions
business_reason: Time-gating had only a START (release_at). Add a window END (expires_at) so a question paper closes after the exam, and handle the real exceptions: a school postponing (extend the window) or cancelling (revoke the materials).

design.gate: packageReleaseGate gains expiresAt: blocked once now > expires_at ('window closed'). Unit-tested (3 new). The school download route reads + passes expires_at.
design.exceptions: POST /api/staff/exams/materials/packages/[id]/window — action 'extend' (postpone: set new release_at and/or expires_at; null expires_at = no end; revoked/superseded cannot be extended) or 'cancel' (exam cancelled: package -> revoked, gate blocks all downloads). Reason required; audited.
design.ui: the /staff/exams/materials/upload page gains an 'Exam window (exceptions)' panel: a new close date/time + Postpone/extend + Cancel exam (revoke).

param_14.question: How is the download window bounded, and what happens if a school postpones or cancels?
param_14.answer: Materials are downloadable only WITHIN a window: from release_at (open) until expires_at (close; NULL = open-ended). If a school postpones, ops EXTEND the window (new open/close) and it re-opens. If a school cancels, ops CANCEL it — the package is revoked and every download is blocked. Both require a reason and are audited.
param_14.answer_source: packageReleaseGate (release_at + expires_at), the window route, migration 0029
param_14.security_implications: a paper cannot be pulled after its window closes; cancel hard-blocks via revoke; reason + audit on every window change; the gate is fail-closed.
param_14.approval_implications: extend/cancel are reason-required staff actions (operational response to a school request); a revoked package cannot be extended — it must be superseded with a fresh release.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: notify schools on window change; per-school window overrides; auto-close worker at expires_at.

verify: npx playwright test material_window material_download material_upload
